news.title:
Analysts discuss buy, hold, and sell strategies for Kalyan Jewellers, JSW Energy, RVNL, Tata Motors CV, Hindustan Copper, and HAL.
Recommendations include bullish targets for Kalyan Jewellers, JSW Energy, and Hindustan Copper, while advising caution for HAL and Max Healthcare.
news.summary:
Analysts discuss buy, hold, and sell strategies for Kalyan Jewellers, JSW Energy, RVNL, Tata Motors CV, Hindustan Copper, and HAL.
Recommendations include bullish targets for Kalyan Jewellers, JSW Energy, and Hindustan Copper, while advising caution for HAL and Max Healthcare.

news.title:
JSW Energy CEO highlights coal-based power's role amid gas supply issues due to Middle East crisis.
JSW Energy targets 13.8 GW capacity by FY-end, with focus on thermal and renewable expansions.
news.summary:
JSW Energy CEO highlights coal-based power's role amid gas supply issues due to Middle East crisis.
JSW Energy targets 13.8 GW capacity by FY-end, with focus on thermal and renewable expansions.

news.title:
JSW Energy faces potential $42M outflows due to Nifty index rejig at 3 PM.
The semi-annual Nifty index rebalancing puts JSW Energy in focus.
news.summary:
JSW Energy faces potential $42M outflows due to Nifty index rejig at 3 PM.
The semi-annual Nifty index rebalancing puts JSW Energy in focus.

news.title:
JSW Energy completes acquisition of Raigarh Champa Rail Infrastructure Pvt Ltd, securing critical railway infrastructure for its 3,600 MW plant in Chhattisgarh.
The acquisition, under NCLT approval, involves Rs. 700.1 Cr via cash and Non-Convertible Debentures, enhancing JSW's operational efficiency and resource control.
news.summary:
JSW Energy completes acquisition of Raigarh Champa Rail Infrastructure Pvt Ltd, securing critical railway infrastructure for its 3,600 MW plant in Chhattisgarh.
The acquisition, under NCLT approval, involves Rs. 700.1 Cr via cash and Non-Convertible Debentures, enhancing JSW's operational efficiency and resource control.

news.title:
Supreme Court dismissed AP DISCOMs' appeal on GBI incentive deductions.
Outcome affects JSW Neo Energy's subsidiary receivables tied to GBI payments.
news.summary:
Supreme Court dismissed AP DISCOMs' appeal on GBI incentive deductions.
Outcome affects JSW Neo Energy's subsidiary receivables tied to GBI payments.

news.title:
ICRA reaffirmed 'ICRA A Stable' rating for Mytrah Vayu Tungabhadra Pvt Ltd.
Mytrah Vayu, a JSW Energy subsidiary, received the rating for long-term bank facilities.
news.summary:
ICRA reaffirmed 'ICRA A Stable' rating for Mytrah Vayu Tungabhadra Pvt Ltd.
Mytrah Vayu, a JSW Energy subsidiary, received the rating for long-term bank facilities.

news.title:
Bernstein gives bullish ratings to Tata Power, Adani Power, JSW Energy, citing India's electrification drive in thermal, nuclear, and grid-linked assets.
Adani Power, JSW Energy, and Tata Power see 15-19% upside; NTPC Green Energy rated 'Underperform' due to execution concerns.
news.summary:
Bernstein gives bullish ratings to Tata Power, Adani Power, JSW Energy, citing India's electrification drive in thermal, nuclear, and grid-linked assets.
Adani Power, JSW Energy, and Tata Power see 15-19% upside; NTPC Green Energy rated 'Underperform' due to execution concerns.

news.title:
JSW Energy confirms interest payment of Rs. 35.2 crore on its NCDs due on 20/03/2026.
Details include ISINs, record date (05/03/2026), and gross/net amounts paid.
news.summary:
JSW Energy confirms interest payment of Rs. 35.2 crore on its NCDs due on 20/03/2026.
Details include ISINs, record date (05/03/2026), and gross/net amounts paid.

news.title:
FIIs invested $497M in Indian power stocks in Feb 2026, driven by rising electricity demand from AI and data centres.
GMR Power surged 19.5%, Torrent Power 14%, Adani Green Energy 11%, NTPC 8%, JSW Energy 6.1%, and Tata Power 3% in Feb.
news.summary:
FIIs invested $497M in Indian power stocks in Feb 2026, driven by rising electricity demand from AI and data centres.
GMR Power surged 19.5%, Torrent Power 14%, Adani Green Energy 11%, NTPC 8%, JSW Energy 6.1%, and Tata Power 3% in Feb.

news.title:
Power stocks like JSW Energy, NTPC Green, Tata Power fall up to 3%, driven by profit booking post rally.
NTPC Green shares dropped 3% to Rs 95.05 after gaining 10% last week amid market weakness.
news.summary:
Power stocks like JSW Energy, NTPC Green, Tata Power fall up to 3%, driven by profit booking post rally.
NTPC Green shares dropped 3% to Rs 95.05 after gaining 10% last week amid market weakness.

news.title:
Coal power may rise amid gas, hydro shortfalls; renewables at 22% of India's generation.
Morgan Stanley sees Adani Power, JSW Energy benefiting; Tata Power, Torrent Power to gain if Section 11 is invoked.
news.summary:
Coal power may rise amid gas, hydro shortfalls; renewables at 22% of India's generation.
Morgan Stanley sees Adani Power, JSW Energy benefiting; Tata Power, Torrent Power to gain if Section 11 is invoked.

news.title:
Power stocks surge led by NTPC Green Energy (+13%), JSW Energy (+7%), Adani Power (+6%). Early summer and LPG crisis boost demand.
Thermal power plants operate at 70% PLF, outperforming solar/wind. NTPC, Adani Power, JSW Energy expected to benefit per Morgan Stanley.
news.summary:
Power stocks surge led by NTPC Green Energy (+13%), JSW Energy (+7%), Adani Power (+6%). Early summer and LPG crisis boost demand.
Thermal power plants operate at 70% PLF, outperforming solar/wind. NTPC, Adani Power, JSW Energy expected to benefit per Morgan Stanley.

news.title:

The company requests BSE to delist scrip code 730322 post redemption.
news.summary:

news.title:
JSW Energy confirms interest payment of Rs. 44.0 Cr (Gross) & Rs. 40.04 Cr (Net of TDS) for NCDs.
Payment made timely on due date, 04-Mar-2026; no changes in payment frequency or delays noted.
news.summary:

Trading approval received from BSE/NSE; shares locked till Sept 9, 2027.

The meeting, part of Kotak Securities' 'Chasing Growth 2026', is subject to change if exigencies arise.

news.title:
India's green hydrogen push targets 5 MMT by 2030, leveraging Rs 8T investments via National Green Hydrogen Mission with policy support and incentives.
Stocks like L&T, Indian Oil, JSW Energy, NTPC, and GSFC anchor the ecosystem, spanning infrastructure, production, and end-use, with gradual progress expected.
news.summary:
India's green hydrogen push targets 5 MMT by 2030, leveraging Rs 8T investments via National Green Hydrogen Mission with policy support and incentives.
Stocks like L&T, Indian Oil, JSW Energy, NTPC, and GSFC anchor the ecosystem, spanning infrastructure, production, and end-use, with gradual progress expected.
